name: Civilian
description: Individuals with no combat training. Cannot carry main weapons or powered armour.
special: Cannot purchase skills. May not use PA or AD armour.

name: Regular
eligibleTargets: The closest enemy troops OR any vehicle/building visible.
description: Average, trained troops with limited battlefield experience.

name: Veteran
eligibleTargets: Choice of any of the 2 closest targets, or any vehicles/buildings.

name: Elite
eligibleTargets: Choice of any of the 3 closest targets, or any vehicles/buildings.
description: Troops trained to a high level including advanced weaponry and combat techniques.

name: Hero
eligibleTargets: Choice of any of the 3 closest targets, or any vehicles/buildings.
description: Particularly capable individual with multiple skills and bonuses in combat. Counts as 3 morale points.
special: Base 20 points. Gets +3 ranged hit (upgradeable to +6 at 2pts/+1). Rolls 3 abilities from hero table. May fire pistol in each hand. Counts as 3 morale points.
